findingDetails.summary: Undocumented global/main-package animateLayout export path remains in runnable snippet; escalated from iteration-002 P1 under iteration-004 undocumented-API=P0 rule.
findingDetails.remediation: Use documented Motion+ module import `unstable_animateLayout as animateLayout` from `motion-plus/animate-layout`, or remove the snippet from runnable assets until a documented browser-global export exists.

findingDetails.summary: Static CDN import does not mirror testimonial.js dynamic import/catch/patch pattern and cannot guard Motion import failure; same snippet animates transform movement without reduced-motion branch.
findingDetails.remediation: Use dynamic import with try/catch and post-import function guards, then branch transform-heavy entrance animation on `prefers-reduced-motion`.

findingDetails.summary: No runnable snippet demonstrates `stagger()` despite router MOTION_DEV signals and official Motion utility coverage.
findingDetails.remediation: Add `stagger` to the sequence snippet or add a dedicated stagger snippet.

notes: All eight snippets have required JSDoc tags and pass `node --check`.
Browser/web fetch resolved distinct snippet @source URLs; local curl HEAD returned 000 because shell DNS/network access is restricted.
Routing probe confirmed WEBFLOW motion marker and OPENCODE target precedence behavior.
